GitHub - civictechdc/hackdc2025: Civic Hack DC 2025 • Outcomes & Archive Central hub for everything produced at the July 26 hackathon: final projects, judging results, slide decks, datasets, and lessons learned. Each project lives in its own folder (or vendored subtree) so future contributors can explore, reproduce, or build on the work without chasing down vanished links. · GitHub
